cases.description: Project payload with missing required slug/title fields must fail Zod validation.
Project payload with missing logo asset relation must render fallback and remain indexable only if SEO minimum is satisfied.
Writing payload with malformed rich text tree must fail closed with non-indexable metadata.
Home story with dangling project relation UUID must ignore missing relation and keep page render stable.
Unexpected locale payload key should not crash mapping and must default to configured locale.
Extreme text lengths in title/description must be normalized for metadata and JSON-LD output.
Invalid date format in project/experience records must fail validation and not publish route.

policy.promotionRule: Any production regression reproduced by tester-agent must be added here within same bug-fix PR.
